response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with roughly 19 years of hands-on experience, entrepreneurial initiative (founded GISCollective), and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP code generators). However, the role is a director-level principal position centered on AI strategy, and the resume shows no recognized AI/ML expertise, no advanced degree in an AI field, no shipped AI products or platforms, and no evidence of operating at principal/director scope — advising strategic customers, setting cloud product direction, or leading engineering strategy across organizations. The gap between senior IC delivery work and the strategic AI leadership this role demands is too wide.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Entrepreneurial track record: founded and maintains an open-source geo-data platform used in production
Recent hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP developer tooling
concerns: No recognized AI/ML expertise or demonstrated AI-powered products, a core preferred qualification
Career has stayed at senior/staff IC delivery level; no evidence of director-level strategic or advisory scope
Limited cloud platform strategy experience — cloud usage is operational (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) rather than architectural or visionary

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI strategy and recognized AI expertise
Seniority gap vs. director-level principal role
Long, diverse engineering experience with entrepreneurial initiative
